name: io.github.codelipenghui/mcp-mat
description: Headless Eclipse MAT MCP server for Java heap dump analysis

environmentVariables.name: MAT_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Path to Eclipse MAT installation directory (e.g., /Applications/MemoryAnalyzer.app/Contents/Eclipse)

environmentVariables.name: MAT_XMX_MB
environmentVariables.description: Maximum JVM heap size in MB for MAT (default: 4096)
